acceptance_gates.interpretation: The attack consumes the T-B8-003c non-stabilizer pilot.
No tested spoofer predicts a single exact transcript above the 1/16 pilot ceiling.
A verifier that only checks the public support template is fully spoofable.
The gate covers deterministic, support-sampling, learned, and leaked-basis spoofers.
No real backend properties or hardware execution are used.
This is a negative guardrail, not a soundness proof.
The report keeps hardware, hardness, advantage, and BQP claims false.

claim_boundary.next_gate: Add verifier-private acceptance predicates, real backend properties, or hardware randomized-measurement execution, then attack the resulting non-public transcript.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: This does not prove protocol soundness, cryptographic soundness, sampling hardness, hardware relevance, quantum advantage, or BQP separation.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: The T-B8-003c pilot removes single-transcript deterministic prediction, but public support-template checking is fully spoofable.

rows.interpretation: Always emits one most-likely transcript from the public template.
Samples uniformly over the public support template.
Learns unbiased challenged marginals and samples the same support.
Uses the disclosed basis locations to generate support-valid transcripts.
